title: An Unsolved Heist in the City of Angels

scenes.text: Valuable artifacts were stolen in a daring daytime heist.
It happened in Los Angeles, at the Getty Museum.
In 2005, thieves stole priceless items worth millions during visiting hours.
Art that was meant to be treasured is now lost.
Despite security footage, no arrests have been made.
scenes.label: NO ARRESTS MADE

scenes.text: Follow because some cases still need answers.

description: 📍 Los Angeles, USA - 2005. In broad daylight, priceless artifacts were stolen, and the case remains unsolved. Follow for daily cold cases!
